text:
Lust (ラスト, Rasuto) is the embodiment of Father's lust. She is mildly flirtatious, but serves mostly as an object of lust for others, feeding their desires so that she could fulfill her duties to Father. 

Appearance

Lust is portrayed as a very beautiful young woman with white skin, slim, curvaceous, brown eyes, red lips and long wavy black hair, she has her symbol on her chest.

She wears a long, elegant black suit that covers her entire body, matching long gloves and sometimes wears a gray fur coat
